title: NHSRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Consultant Posts
description: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Senior Consultant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can use this chance and apply for the NHSRC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply online before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, here is...
